recommended_next_batch.reason: Exploit the strongest raw survivor prescreen_0002 before widening again.
Keep one branch explicitly aimed at arb-loss improvement so cheaper calm quoting is not selected blindly.
Keep one branch focused on weak low-retail, low-volatility, or tail slices instead of only overall mean_edge.
Recent failures show fee-surface shape matters; keep one branch constrained on average fee drift or max_fee_jump.
Reserve one orthogonal pivot so the batch does not collapse into semantically different versions of the same phenotype.
